title: Senator Strickland and Glenn Gray, CEO of PMMC, the recipient of the 36th Senate District nonprofit of the year award. Photo courtesy: California State Senate Click here to downloa
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: PMMC is the only center in Orange County licensed to rescue and respond to sea lions, seals, sea turtles, dolphins, and whales.
PMMC has worked tirelessly to ensure the highest animal rescue and rehabilitation.
PMMC offers effective STEM educational programs.
PMMC conducts comprehensive research related to ocean stewardship.
